title: Questions for Raquel
intro: Walk through each page and answer below. Check “No change needed” if it looks right, or type what should change. At the bottom of every page, tell us if you need anything else added. Use the toggle at the bottom-right to show or hide questions on the site.
actionItemsIntro: Launch tasks for Grey Chair — not regular page copy.

flags.question: Domain already purchased — no action needed. (Hosting access only if Grey Chair still needs it to go live.)
Should the public brand stay “Beauty by Raquel Nicole,” show “RS C&C LLC” anywhere, or use a different name on the site?
(513) 330-2277 approved — footer, header, map, mobile CTA, and schema.
Client email: raquel.pmts2019@gmail.com (updated site-wide).
Location: The Beauty Bar, Floor 2 · 212 Main St, Old Milford / Milford, OH 45150. Middle door on front of building; street parking and public lots nearby.
Are these hours correct? Tue 10–6, Wed 9–5, Thu 12–8, Fri 10–6, Sat 9–3, closed Sun–Mon. List any holidays or exceptions.
Is Square online booking the only way you want clients to book, or should we also push phone/text? Is your Square service list complete and priced correctly?
Social links: Instagram (@beauty_by_raquel_nicole), Facebook, and TikTok (@BeautyByRaquelNicole).
Brighter coral-peach and rose palette applied site-wide — warmer, less plain, still professional.
Home hero headline: does “My passion is making you feel like YOU again” sound right, or would you like different wording?
Home hero intro (RS C&C LLC, 7 years, The Beauty Bar, specialties, bridal updos): accurate and complete? Anything to add or remove?
Home before/after photo: is this the transformation you want featured, or do you have a different image to use?
About section on the home page (hairapist, mental health, hobbies): does this sound like you? Any edits to tone or details?
Stats shown (500+ clients, 7+ years, 100% satisfaction, Licensed): are these numbers accurate and okay to publish?
Profile photo and “Meet Raquel Schmid” card: correct name spelling, title, and image? Prefer Nicole vs Schmid on the site?
Testimonials/reviews section: are these representative of real clients? Should we link to Google reviews only, or add/remove quotes?
Services intro includes balayage, color, extensions, cuts, bridal updos, and formal occasion styling in Milford.
Service names, durations, and prices approved as shown (Jun 28). Re-sync with Square when Raquel applies her planned price increase.
All over color description clarified: solid color only, not highlights or foils. Other descriptions approved unless Raquel sends more edits.
Color filter includes root retouch, The Full/Half and haircut, and money piece foils per Raquel's booking groups.
Dedicated About page top intro: all experience copy should say 7 years to match your bio.
About page repeats home content (about + testimonials). Keep as-is for SEO, or trim so it feels less repetitive?
Gallery intro updated — no longer claims current photos are hers; Raquel is hand-picking work by service.
Gallery photos: Raquel will send Will her photo picks for each service — swap in when assets arrive.
Gallery categories (balayage, extensions, cuts, etc.): approved as shown — no changes needed.
Bridal intro updated (on-site, trial, party size); bridal styles gallery section added — awaiting Raquel's photo picks.
Bridal rates: $95 bride, $80 bridal party/adults, $45 children 8 and under, $75 trial.
Bridal policies: deposit + contract, 4-person minimum, required $75 trial 1+ month out, travel $50 or $2/mile (whichever is greater).
Bridal inquiry form: added ready-by time and optional inspiration photo uploads.
Contact page intro (location, parking, booking online): anything to clarify for first-time clients finding The Beauty Bar?
Map and directions: does the pin land on the right building/entrance? Parking tips to add?
Book page: does the Square booking widget load and show the right services? Any instructions clients need before booking?
Footer (copyright, The Beauty Bar | Old Milford, links, hours): approved as shown — no changes needed.
SEO snippets use softer wording: Milford hairstylist, Milford blonding hairstylist, hair extension stylist Milford.
Home page — is there anything else you need on this page? (more photos, a new section, different wording, links, pricing callouts, etc.)
Services page — is there anything else you need on this page? (services to add/remove, packages, policies, photos, FAQs, etc.)
About page — is there anything else you need on this page? (more about you, certifications, team, photos, personal story, etc.)
Gallery page — is there anything else you need on this page? (more photos, before/after sets, video, Instagram feed, categories, etc.)
Bridal page — is there anything else you need on this page? (pricing tiers, packages, timeline, inspiration gallery, policies, etc.)
Contact page — is there anything else you need on this page? (directions, parking, contact form, FAQ, salon photos, etc.)
Book page — is there anything else you need on this page? (booking instructions, cancellation policy, deposit info, what to expect, etc.)
